Note: “HHI” and “Household size” are ZIP-level averages (not customer-level attributes).

Income Extremes (Median HHI)

Top and bottom ZIPs by median household income for the current filters (State + Brand). This can help identify areas where pricing may have more (or less) headroom.

These controls mirror the main filters and update the full dashboard.

ZIP City State Median HHI Bookings (Year) Group
Income is a ZIP-level median (not customer-level). By default this chart includes ZIPs with >0 bookings in the selected year.

Top 15 ZIP Trends (per State)

ZIPs that ever rank in the top 15 by bookings in any year for the selected state.

Delta Map (2020 → 2025)

ZIP-level change in bookings from 2020 to 2025 for the selected state.

ZIP Details

Delta Summary

Exposure vs Impact

Separates “how many ZIPs exist” (exposure) from “how many bookings they contribute” (impact) for the focus year.

Income tier

Household size tier

“ZIP share” is the share of ZIPs in the selected scope that fall into each tier. “Bookings share” is the share of bookings in the focus year coming from each tier.

Income × Household Size Mix

Segment “fingerprint” by Income tier and Household size tier.

Heatmap cells aggregate ZIPs that fall into the selected Income tier and Household size tier buckets.

Declines Watchlist

Quick list of ZIPs with the largest declines over the selected YoY window (respects State + Brand; not limited to Top-10).

ZIP City Bookings (Start) Bookings (End) Net Δ % Δ HHI tier HH-size tier

Tip: Use the Income tier and Household size filters above (Top Gains/Declines) to compare segment patterns; the watchlist is designed for fast triage.

Income & Bookings (ZIP-level)

For the selected state and brand, this shows how median household income relates to bookings at the ZIP level.

High-income ZIPs with low bookings

Bookings vs Household Size

Scatterplot of bookings versus average household size for the selected state, brand, and year.

Price & Bookings (ZIP-level)

Relationship between average 1000-gallon tank pumping price and bookings for the selected state/brand and focus year.

Sources: Power BI report WRE Booking Details; US Census Bureau Income by Zip Code Tabulation Area (ZCTA); ZIP-level 1000-gallon tank price file.
